name: python3-roguehostapd
title: python3-roguehostapd
summary: Hostapd fork with Wi-Fi attacks and Python bindings with ctypes (Python 3)
description:
Hostapd fork with Wi-Fi attacks and Python bindings with ctypes (Python 3)
This package contains a fork of hostapd, the famous user space software access
point. It provides Python ctypes bindings and a number of additional attack
features. It was primarily developed for use in the Wifiphisher project.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-roguehostapd because Hostapd fork with Wi-Fi attacks and Python bindings with ctypes (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-roguehostapd as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-roguehostapd with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-roguehostapd --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
